title: taraxacum verticosum
intro: Taraxacum verticosum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with a rosette of leaves and a tall stem bearing yellow flowers, often used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum verticosum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are said to have health benefits including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function.
